name: WhatsApp Passive Monitor
description: Intercepts WhatsApp messages via message_observed hook (pre-access-control), stores in SQLite, and classifies via local LLM. Returns { handled: true } to block agent dispatch.

ollamaUrl.label: Ollama URL
ollamaUrl.help: URL of the Ollama API (default: http://localhost:11434)

debounceMs.label: Debounce (ms)
debounceMs.help: Silence period before classifying a conversation (default: 5000)

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Relative path for SQLite database (default: passive/messages.db)

outputDir.label: Output Directory
outputDir.help: Relative path for classification logs (default: passive)

detectMeetings.label: Detect Meetings
detectMeetings.help: Enable LLM-based meeting detection pipeline (default: true). When false, messages are stored but not classified.
